edges.evidence_quote: The Bowery Boys often battled multiple outfits of the infamous Five Points, most notably the Dead Rabbits, with whom they feuded for decades.
edges.context: The Bowery Boys and Dead Rabbits fought each other in a long-standing feud.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: American Guards, Atlantic Guards, Empire Guards, O'Connell Guards, True Blue Americans, American Republican Party (American Nativist Party, American Party), Order of the Star Spangled Banner (Anti-immigrant secret society)
edges.context: The Bowery Boys were allied with the American Guards.
